targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_wtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_wtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_wtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_wtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_mtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_mtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_mtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_mtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_qtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_qtd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_qtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_qtd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_ytd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_ytd_delta_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT rolling_ytd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT rolling_ytd_delta_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT 'WTD' AS period, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_usd, 0) AS delta_usd, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_pct, 2) AS delta_pct, ROUND(rolling_wtd_income, 0) AS income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MTD', ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QTD', ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YTD', ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_ytd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'WTD' AS period, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_usd, 0) AS delta_usd, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_pct, 2) AS delta_pct, ROUND(rolling_wtd_income, 0) AS income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MTD', ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QTD', ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YTD', ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_usd, 0), ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_ytd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
